cardDesc: Autonomous warehouse routing optimization using proprietary neural network architecture developed at MIT.
Low-energy desalination technology utilizing kinetic wave energy to provide clean water to coastal communities.
Secure, decentralized lending platform specifically designed for micro-entrepreneurs in emerging markets.
Synthetic, biocompatible skin grafts for rapid healing of severe burns and chronic ulcers.
Adaptive AI tutoring system that mirrors the Socratic method for high school mathematics.
Unified analytics for hybrid-remote teams, focusing on output quality over time-tracking metrics.
